schedules.description: Rory Coach — weekly content intelligence brief (Sunday 9am NZ, emailed direct to Rory)
Apex morning protocol — brain + body integrated daily plan (8am)
Apex evening debrief — primary data collection, pattern analysis (7pm)
Atlas morning world briefing (6:15am daily, one comprehensive scan)
Send per-user API cost report to Nexus (7:05am daily — after Tom's morning brief)
Flush DND-held messages at 6am when Do Not Disturb ends
Clean up conversation history older than 7 days (3:30am daily)
Forge morning check-in for Tyler (7am daily)
Forge evening debrief + data collection for Tyler (6:30pm daily)
Aether morning check-in for Jackson (7am daily)
Aether evening check-in for Jackson (6:30pm daily)
Nova morning check-in for Tane (8am daily)
Nova evening debrief + data collection for Tane (6pm daily)
Monthly affiliate payout report — calculates commissions, emails summary to marketing@ (28th 9am)
